query: SELECT wi.id, wi.name, wi.deviceCode, wi.slaveId, wi.modelType, ic.id as chId, ic.channelIndex, ic.label, ic.registerAddress, ic.enabled, ic.scale, ic.`offset`, ic.unit, ic.currentValue FROM weighingInstruments wi LEFT JOIN instrumentChannels ic ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE wi.deviceCode = 'C001' ORDER BY ic.channelIndex;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT wi.id, wi.name, wi.deviceCode, wi.slaveId, wi.modelType, ic.id as chId, ic.channelIndex, ic.label, ic.registerAddress, ic.enabled, ic.scale, ic.`offset`, ic.unit, ic.currentValue FROM weighingInstruments wi LEFT JOIN instrumentChannels ic ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE wi.deviceCode = 'C001' ORDER BY ic.channelIndex;
